claims.text: The embodied sim-to-real fixture emits EMBODIED_SIM2REAL_FIXTURE_MATCH, satisfies the nominal trajectory, safety, latency, and unit checks, and rejects the configured negative controls.
claims.falsification: The fixture output is missing EMBODIED_SIM2REAL_FIXTURE_MATCH, any nominal check is false, or any configured negative control is accepted as MATCH.

claims.text: The embodied source ledger stores arXiv metadata and digest receipts as source leads rather than promoted robotics, medical, safety, foundation-model, or sim-to-real claims.
claims.falsification: The source ledger or publication copy promotes arXiv rows into verified domain results or stores full raw paper/transcript payloads as evidence bodies.

claims.text: The publication copy labels the preflight as a local deterministic fixture and blocks real robot safety, surgical/medical, VLA/foundation-model, sim-to-real-at-scale, and BuildLang/buildc-native runtime claims for this pass.
claims.falsification: The official, working-paper, or outreach copy claims real robot safety, validates embodied foundation models, makes a medical recommendation, proves large-scale sim-to-real transfer, or says the fixture already runs natively through BuildLang/buildc.
